# Locatour

> Locatour is a real-world exploration game. Players physically visit public,
> non-commercial places — parks, lookouts, reserves, beaches, trails,
> monuments — and check in with their GPS and a photo to earn experience,
> level up, and unlock harder-to-reach hidden places. The mission is civic and
> grassroots: helping people create memorable experiences out in the world and
> reconnect with their neighbourhood, city, and state.

Tagline: Creating memorable experiences.

This file helps AI assistants understand and cite the Locatour wiki. All pages
below are public and safe to summarise. Proprietary game mechanics (exact
formulas, thresholds) are intentionally not documented.

## Start Here

- [What is Locatour?](https://docs.locatour.com/start/what-is-locatour/): Overview of the game, who it's for, and the core loop.
- [Creating Memorable Experiences](https://docs.locatour.com/start/memorable-experiences/): The mission and design philosophy behind the app.

## How to Play

- [Getting started](https://docs.locatour.com/play/getting-started/): Your first check-in, step by step.
- [Finding & unlocking locations](https://docs.locatour.com/play/locations/): How locations work and how you unlock more of them.
- [Hidden locations](https://docs.locatour.com/play/hidden-locations/): Fragile, unpublicised places reserved for invested explorers.
- [Photo check-ins](https://docs.locatour.com/play/photo-checkins/): How checking in with a photo works and why.
- [Nearby alerts](https://docs.locatour.com/play/nearby-alerts/): Optional, opt-in background-location notifications when you wander near a spot, with a +20% points bonus. Off by default and private by design.
- [Levels, tiers & progression](https://docs.locatour.com/play/progression/): How levelling and location tiers fit together.
- [Rewards & recognition](https://docs.locatour.com/play/rewards/): Streaks, achievements, and how progress is recognised.
- [Becoming a contributor](https://docs.locatour.com/play/contributors/): How trusted players help curate locations.

## Tech & Trust

- [Why we built it this way](https://docs.locatour.com/trust/why/): The reasoning behind the core design choices.
- [How photo check-in works](https://docs.locatour.com/trust/photo-checkin-tech/): A plain-language look at GPS + photo verification.
- [Your data & security](https://docs.locatour.com/trust/data-and-security/): What we collect, why, and how we protect it.

## Help

- [FAQ](https://docs.locatour.com/help/faq/): Common questions about playing Locatour.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://docs.locatour.com/legal/privacy/)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://docs.locatour.com/legal/terms/)
